title: pachycaulos nummularia
intro: Pachycaulos nummularia, also known as Money Plant or Chinese Money Plant, is a popular, low-maintenance houseplant native to China and Southeast Asia. Its medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pachycaulos nummularia include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Pachycaulos nummularia are often used in traditional Chinese medicine, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
